---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research projects and applied forecasting work."
page-layout: full
format: html
---

::: {.content-section}
## Research Projects

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i>

### PhD Project

Forecasting and decision-support methods for health commodity supply chains, with a focus on uncertainty, inventory decisions, and practical tools for social good.

::: {.project-tags}
<span class="project-tag">Forecasting</span>
<span class="project-tag">Uncertainty</span>
<span class="project-tag">Supply chains</span>
:::

[View project](../phd/index.qmd){.btn-custom .btn-primary}
:::
:::
:::
